dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3314 IS: Written Informed Consent Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Sheehy (for himself and Mr. Tuberville) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To direct the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to expand a directive of the Veterans Health Administration regarding informed consent to apply to certain types of medications.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Written Informed Consent Act.

section.header: Expansion of certain directive of the Veterans Health Administration regarding informed consent to apply to certain types of medications
section.text: The Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall update directive 1005 of the Veterans Health Administration, dated May 13, 2020, and titled Informed Consent for Long-Term Opioid Therapy for Pain, to apply to the following types of medications:
